name: Disturbed
short_description: Play as a farmer who struggles to manage a failing farm. You come to a point where there is no more hope, and you must do something.
detailed_description: Disturbed is an adventure/horror visual adventure, inspired by experiences of depression and addiction. All visuals are hand-drawn to express personality and a sense of horror. Play as Von, a farmer who struggles to manage a failing farm. You come to a point where there is no more hope, and you must do something. You figure that you will die and it is just a matter of how and where. What difference is there to make? What can a simple farmer do? Only you can answer these questions. If you enjoy this short adventure, consider purchasing the sequel!
about_the_game: Disturbed is an adventure/horror visual adventure, inspired by experiences of depression and addiction. All visuals are hand-drawn to express personality and a sense of horror. If you enjoy this short adventure, consider purchasing the sequel!
supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Russian, German, Ukrainian, Italian, French, Portuguese - Portugal
